title: French Bean Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring tender beans and rich rillettes, perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the sliced tender and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced long pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the French beans to the skillet and cook until they start to tenderize, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the rillettes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the bean mixture to a baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the beans are tender.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
